top_signals.title: What every dealmaker should know about the limits of general-purpose AI tools
top_signals.summary: Connecting AI to deal documents is only the first step. The real advantage comes from building intelligence across the deal life cycle. As artificial intelligence (AI) adoption accelerates across mergers and acquisitions (M&A), many firms are mistaking connectivity for intelligence. Connecting a large language model (LLM) to a traditional virtual data room (VDR) through model [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
